Name: Average time for Request Payment in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in variants without any rejection versus variants with Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time for Request Payment grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Request Payment across all process variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time it takes Request Payment to be done after Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in successful paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total resolution time of Request Payment in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER followed by resubmission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in variants that bypass PRE_APPROVER versus those that involve PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to the Request Payment after the last approval activity (e.g., Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Elapsed time between Request Payment and Payment Handled in cases originally rejected by PRE_APPROVER versus never-rejected cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Request Payment in domestic declarations filed within two months after the trip versus those filed immediately after cost payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Request Payment and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Request Payment in variants where the supervisor and budget owner are the same person versus when they are different
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Request Payment and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time it takes Request Payment to be executed after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in high-frequency variants (top 3 by frequency)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to variants containing Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Request Payment in successful end-to-end executions
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time until Request Payment is performed in cases that go through exactly three approval steps versus two approval steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'
